description_long: This is a pair of slip-joint pliers featuring a robust metallic construction with a matte, slightly weathered finish. The jaws are wide and serrated, designed for gripping and turning objects of various sizes, and include a slip-joint mechanism for adjustable jaw width. The handles are long, straight, and covered with a dark red rubberized coating, providing both insulation and a secure grip. The pivot point is prominent and allows the jaws to open wider or narrower depending on the selected slot. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for gripping, twisting, or compressing objects in urban maintenance or repair scenarios. No visible branding or logos are present on the tool.
description: A sturdy pair of slip-joint pliers with serrated jaws and long, straight, red rubber-coated handles. The metallic body and adjustable pivot make it ideal for gripping and turning objects.
description_view_0: The pliers are shown from a three-quarter view, highlighting the serrated jaws, slip-joint mechanism, and the full length of the red-coated handles.
description_view_1: A side profile view, showing the thinness of the pliers and the alignment of the handles and jaws.
description_view_2: The opposite three-quarter view, again displaying the serrated jaws, slip-joint, and the straight handles with red grips.
description_view_3: A narrow edge-on view, emphasizing the slim profile and the thickness of the metal components.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, elongated handles with dark red rubberized insulation for improved grip and comfort.
attribute_jaw_design: Wide, serrated jaws with a slip-joint slot for adjustable opening; designed for gripping and turning various shapes, lacking wire cutter or specialty notches.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Slip-joint mechanism with a visible adjustable slot, allowing for two jaw width settings.
attribute_grip_pattern: Handles are covered in smooth, rubberized material; jaw gripping surfaces are serrated for enhanced hold.
